query: SELECT id, name, slug, address, neighborhood FROM establishments WHERE address LIKE '%Aroaba%' OR address LIKE '%aroaba%' OR (name LIKE '%Mocot%' AND address LIKE '%Leopoldina%')
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT id, name, slug, address, neighborhood FROM establishments WHERE address LIKE '%Aroaba%' OR address LIKE '%aroaba%' OR (name LIKE '%Mocot%' AND address LIKE '%Leopoldina%')
